JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Continued To Jan-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 306
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ashwin Ladva, Esq. for and with the plaintifff Denise Booker. William Jemmott, Esq. for Defendant William Hong.
The Court and counsel and plaintiff conference privately in chambers.
Matter has settled, terms as follows: Parties understand and agreed to a final settlement amount of $2,500.00. Each to bear own fees & costs, responsible for satisgying all lienholders, and dismissal of the case. Waives all right under Civil Code section 1542.
Release of all claims is signed by the parties in open court. Matter will be set on CRC Dismissal calendar and a written notice will be sent to counsel.
Dept. 306. Judge Richard Ulmer, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.
